ddls:
CREATE TABLE "soil_samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each soil sample */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the sample was collected */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling protocol used */,
  "replicate" INTEGER /* Replicate number of the sample */,
  "upper_cm" INTEGER /* Upper depth of the sample in centimeters */,
  "lower_cm" INTEGER /* Lower depth of the sample in centimeters */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the sample */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the sample */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_soil_samples_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the site in meters */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  "land_use" TEXT /* Current land use at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used in the protocol */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the sampling */,
  "duration_minutes" INTEGER /* Duration of the sampling process in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample being measured */,
  "soc_pct" REAL /* Soil organic carbon (SOC) percentage */,
  "som_pct" REAL /* Soil organic matter (SOM) percentage */,
  "bd_g_cm3" REAL /* Bulk density (BD) in g/cm3 */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measured_by_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the measurement */,
  "moisture_content_pct" REAL /* Moisture content of the soil sample in percentage */,
  "ph_value" REAL /* pH value of the soil sample */,
  "c_organic_matter_ratio" REAL /* Carbon to organic matter ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_measured_by_id FOREIGN KEY ("measured_by_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sample_project_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the soil sample */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_project_links_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sample_project_links_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES soil_samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_project_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_project_links_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_project_links_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
